justification: The diff successfully migrates from Java 11/Spring Boot 2.5 to Java 21/Spring Boot 3.3, updating javax to jakarta namespaces, replacing deprecated Spring Security patterns (WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter -> SecurityFilterChain), and adopting Java 21 idioms like pattern matching for instanceof and String.formatted(). However, it introduces some unnecessary churn by adding @DependsOnDatabaseInitialization to multiple DAOs and changing Runtime.exec() behavior, which might not be strictly necessary for the migration. The dependency management section in pom.xml has some inconsistencies (e.g., keeping thymeleaf-spring5 in dependencyManagement while using thymeleaf-spring6 in dependencies).
